# navigation — flutter

| Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `deep_link` | go_router handles deep links automatically when incoming URIs match declared route paths. |
| `go_router` | `go_router` is the standard Flutter navigation solution — declarative and deep-link ready. |
| `navigate_from_bloc` | BLoC emits a typed `navAction` in state; `BlocListener` reads it and calls `context.go/push`. |
| `nested_navigation` | Use `ShellRoute` for persistent navigation bars that persist across tab changes. |
